name: Sun Dance Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard over medium heat in a large heavy pot. Add the onion and cook until translucent. Stir in the celery and bell pepper, cooking for an additional five minutes.
2. Mix the ground beef with the hot and mild red chile, oregano, cumin, and garlic. Stir in this meat-and-spice mixture into the pot. Break up any lumps with a fork and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is evenly browned.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except the beans to the pot. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the beans and their liquid. Simmer, uncovered, for an additional 1/2 hour. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
